audit_scope: Full codebase audit — 283 source files, ~75,000 lines

issues.title: SSRF with PAT leak via azure.com allowlist
issues.failure_scenario: Attacker crafts URL like evil.com.azure.com -> passes allowlist -> PAT header sent to attacker-controlled server

issues.title: Path traversal in push-xlsx endpoint
issues.failure_scenario: filename=../../.env -> server writes attacker file outside intended directory

issues.title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML in comments
issues.failure_scenario: ADO comment with <script>steal_cookie()</script> executes in user browser

issues.title: XSS via dangerouslySetInnerHTML in descriptions
issues.failure_scenario: Work item description with malicious JS executes without sanitization

issues.title: {{username}}/{{password}} credential substitution MISSING
issues.failure_scenario: Agent types literal {{password}} into login field -> test fails every time, credentials never injected

issues.title: multi_tool_use crash on batched tool calls
issues.failure_scenario: Claude returns multi_tool_use content block -> executor expects single tool_use -> KeyError crash

issues.title: browser_session yields None page
issues.failure_scenario: Context manager yields before page.goto completes -> NoneType error on first action

issues.title: Dialog auto-dismiss freezes page permanently
issues.failure_scenario: page.on('dialog') auto-accepts -> blocks modal that needed user choice -> page frozen

issues.title: XOR fallback encryption broken for PATs
issues.failure_scenario: When AES unavailable, XOR cipher with static key -> trivially reversible -> PAT extraction

issues.title: Thread-unsafe global SSL context mutation
issues.failure_scenario: Two concurrent requests -> race on ssl.create_default_context() -> one gets wrong cert chain

issues.title: XXE in XML parsing (2 instances)
issues.failure_scenario: Malicious .docx with XXE entity -> reads /etc/passwd or SSRF to internal network

issues.title: pdf2image OOM on large PDFs (no page limit)
issues.failure_scenario: 200-page PDF -> pdf2image converts ALL pages to PIL images simultaneously -> OOM kill

issues.title: RAM accumulation during bundle build
issues.failure_scenario: Large KB with 500+ docs -> bundle holds all processed docs in memory -> OOM on 4GB machine

issues.title: LLM proxy is open relay when PROXY_TOKEN unset
issues.failure_scenario: No token configured -> anyone can use the proxy to make unlimited LLM calls at owner cost

issues.title: SSRF via path manipulation in LLM proxy
issues.failure_scenario: Attacker sends crafted path -> proxy forwards to internal service -> reads internal data

issues.title: script_generator calls undefined browser.close()
issues.failure_scenario: Legacy path invoked -> AttributeError: browser has no close() -> unhandled crash

issues.title: Video recording assigned to wrong test result
issues.failure_scenario: Parallel tests -> video filenames collide -> wrong video attached to result

issues.title: Status ignores pass_fallback flag
issues.failure_scenario: Test with pass_fallback=True still marked as fail -> false negative reported

issues.title: Authenticated SSRF via fetch_ado_blob_async
issues.failure_scenario: Work item attachment URL crafted to internal IP -> PAT header sent to internal service

issues.title: Unbounded N+1 relation fetches (no limit)
issues.failure_scenario: Board with 10K work items each with 50 relations -> 500K HTTP calls -> rate limited + OOM

issues.title: Zip path traversal in bundle extraction
issues.failure_scenario: Malicious zip with ../../ paths -> writes files outside extraction dir -> code execution

issues.title: VBScript injection via unsanitized paths
issues.failure_scenario: Install path with embedded VBS -> shortcut creation executes injected script

issues.title: Unsafe double-cast bypasses type checking
issues.failure_scenario: Response cast as unknown as T -> runtime type mismatch -> undefined field access downstream

issues.title: XSS trust chain fragility in installer
issues.failure_scenario: Installer template renders user input without escaping -> script injection in install page

issues.title: SettingsResponse missing tls_mode field
issues.failure_scenario: Frontend reads tls_mode from response -> gets undefined -> TLS indicator shows wrong state

issues.title: No authentication on any API endpoint
issues.failure_scenario: Any local process can call /e2e/start and run tests or exfiltrate data

issues.title: CORS allows all origins
issues.failure_scenario: Malicious page on any domain can call agent API from browser

issues.title: Path traversal in updater download
issues.failure_scenario: Crafted manifest ref with ../ -> writes outside install dir

issues.title: Jobs dict race condition (no lock)
issues.failure_scenario: Concurrent start/status calls -> dict mutation during iteration -> RuntimeError

issues.title: No concurrency limit on E2E runs
issues.failure_scenario: 5 simultaneous runs -> 5 browser instances -> OOM on 8GB machine

issues.title: Path traversal in KB file operations
issues.failure_scenario: kb_name=../../etc -> reads/writes outside KB directory

issues.title: No retry on transient OpenAI/Anthropic errors
issues.failure_scenario: Single 502 from API -> entire test case fails instead of retrying

issues.title: ConnectError unhandled in LLM client
issues.failure_scenario: Network blip -> unhandled ConnectError -> crash propagates to caller

issues.title: asyncio.run() called inside async context
issues.failure_scenario: Already in event loop -> RuntimeError: cannot call asyncio.run() from running loop

issues.title: Guessable key derivation (machine-name + username)
issues.failure_scenario: Attacker knows machine name -> derives encryption key -> decrypts stored credentials

issues.title: PAT stored in environment variable (inspectable)
issues.failure_scenario: Any process on machine can read PAT via /proc/PID/environ or Get-Process

issues.title: Sync wrappers incompatible with running event loops
issues.failure_scenario: Called from async context -> nested loop error -> deadlock or crash

issues.title: TOCTOU race on temperature setting
issues.failure_scenario: Two threads read/write temperature -> one gets stale value -> wrong LLM behavior

issues.title: stop_all race condition on server shutdown
issues.failure_scenario: Concurrent stop_all calls -> double-close on subprocess -> OSError

issues.title: consecutive_fails counter is dead code
issues.failure_scenario: Counter resets on success but threshold check uses wrong variable -> stuck detection never fires

issues.title: Password detection regex too fragile (2 instances)
issues.failure_scenario: Non-standard password field name -> credential not redacted -> leaked to LLM context

issues.title: inspect_network_request replays actual requests
issues.failure_scenario: Tool re-sends captured request -> double-submits form -> duplicate data created

issues.title: evaluate_js executes unguarded arbitrary JavaScript
issues.failure_scenario: LLM hallucinates malicious JS -> executes in page context -> data exfiltration

issues.title: Prompt injection via ai_instructions field
issues.failure_scenario: Malicious ai_instructions in credentials -> overrides system prompt -> agent executes attacker goals

issues.title: No retry on OCR service failures
issues.failure_scenario: Transient OCR API error -> document skipped entirely -> incomplete KB

issues.title: Vector store corruption on concurrent writes
issues.failure_scenario: Two KB index jobs write simultaneously -> FAISS index corrupted -> all searches fail

issues.title: context_summary gather causes OOM
issues.failure_scenario: Large KB -> gather all chunks into memory for summary -> OOM on 4GB machine

issues.title: TLS verification bypass in media download
issues.failure_scenario: verify=False -> MITM can inject malicious content into KB

issues.title: Unsafe PID kill without process validation
issues.failure_scenario: Stale PID file -> kills unrelated process that reused the PID

issues.title: Socket leak on connection check failure
issues.failure_scenario: Repeated failed health checks -> socket exhaustion -> OS refuses new connections

issues.title: Windows chmod is a no-op
issues.failure_scenario: os.chmod(0o600) does nothing on Windows -> .env.enc readable by all users

issues.title: Race condition in zip extraction + rename
issues.failure_scenario: Antivirus locks extracted file -> rename fails -> half-extracted state

issues.title: No integrity check on downloaded bundle
issues.failure_scenario: Corrupted/tampered download -> installs broken agent -> silent malfunction

issues.title: Race condition in chat message submission
issues.failure_scenario: Double-click send -> two messages dispatched -> duplicate responses

issues.title: Race condition in E2E start
issues.failure_scenario: Double-click start -> two runs launched simultaneously -> resource contention

issues.title: No error boundary in AppShell
issues.failure_scenario: Unhandled throw in any child -> entire app white-screens

issues.title: Unbounded log array in state
issues.failure_scenario: Long E2E run generates 10K+ log entries -> state array grows unbounded -> UI freezes

issues.title: Stale closure in event handler
issues.failure_scenario: Board data updates -> handler captures old state -> actions applied to wrong items

issues.title: No auth on installer endpoint
issues.failure_scenario: Anyone on network can trigger agent install/update remotely

issues.title: GitHub token embedded in installer template
issues.failure_scenario: Token visible in client-side source -> repo access by any user who views page source

issues.title: Length-oracle in token comparison
issues.failure_scenario: Timing side-channel on string compare -> attacker can brute-force token byte-by-byte

issues.title: No rate limiting on any endpoint
issues.failure_scenario: Attacker floods /llm proxy -> unlimited API spend at owner cost

issues.title: Auth header leaked in error responses
issues.failure_scenario: Error handler includes request headers in response -> PAT visible to client

issues.title: Missing Content-Security-Policy
issues.failure_scenario: No CSP -> XSS payloads execute freely without browser mitigation

issues.title: Credential exposure in installer-template
issues.failure_scenario: PAT passed as URL param in installer flow -> visible in browser history and server logs

issues.title: Race condition in concurrent uploads
issues.failure_scenario: Two uploads share progress state -> progress bar jumps erratically -> one upload silently fails

issues.title: Unbounded log memory leak
issues.failure_scenario: SSE stream never cleared -> log array grows indefinitely -> tab crashes after hours

issues.title: Stale closure in reloadBoards callback
issues.failure_scenario: Board list updates -> callback uses stale board array -> operations target wrong board

issues.title: No runtime response validation
issues.failure_scenario: Backend schema changes -> frontend silently receives wrong shape -> undefined access crash

issues.title: JIRA path traversal in issue key
issues.failure_scenario: Crafted issue key with ../ -> file write outside JIRA cache dir

issues.title: Query param injection in WIQL
issues.failure_scenario: User input in board filter -> injected into WIQL query -> unauthorized data access

issues.title: No retry on test case creation failure
issues.failure_scenario: Transient ADO 503 -> test case not created -> silent data loss

issues.title: Unbounded image accumulation in memory
issues.failure_scenario: Board with 1000 image attachments -> all loaded to RAM -> OOM

issues.title: RTF parsing OOM on large documents
issues.failure_scenario: 50MB RTF attachment -> loaded entirely to memory for parsing -> OOM

issues.title: Xray test steps order not guaranteed
issues.failure_scenario: Steps returned unordered -> test execution order wrong -> false failures

issues.title: /sources/verify returns wider response than TS expects
issues.failure_scenario: Frontend ignores ado_configured/jira_configured fields -> source setup UI shows incomplete state

issues.title: ReviewedDefectModel drops images field
issues.failure_scenario: Frontend sends images array -> backend silently drops it -> uploaded defects have no screenshots

issues.title: TagRequest.wi_id str/int type mismatch
issues.failure_scenario: Numeric ADO ID sent as number -> Pydantic str validation fails -> 422 error on tag

issues.title: Triple retry-request implementation
issues.failure_scenario: Behavioral drift: ado/boards._retry_request has different backoff from core/http_retry -> inconsistent timeout handling

issues.title: Parallel board-module architecture duplicates ~80 lines
issues.failure_scenario: Bug fixed in ADO boards not propagated to JIRA boards -> feature parity broken

issues.title: Version says 3.44.0, actual is 3.50.0
issues.failure_scenario: Panel reads CODEBASE.md -> sees 3.44.0 -> questions whether v3.50 features exist

issues.title: REQUIRED_AGENT_VERSION documented as 2.29.0
issues.failure_scenario: Developer references doc -> sets wrong version -> app bricked with update loop

issues.title: E2E section describes dead compile-then-execute arch
issues.failure_scenario: Panel evaluates architecture from docs -> judges superseded design -> wrong assessment

issues.title: Stage A/B describe dead path as MANDATORY
issues.failure_scenario: New developer implements to spec -> builds against dead e2e_plan.py -> wasted work

issues.title: /generate/extract wraps in {files:[]} not flat array
issues.failure_scenario: TS unwraps via data.files -- works but undocumented; future refactor may break

issues.title: E2E wi_ids list[str] vs generate list[int]
issues.failure_scenario: Numeric ADO ID sent to E2E as int -> Pydantic str coercion works but fragile

issues.title: E2E result missing results array on partial stop
issues.failure_scenario: Job stopped -> results omitted -> TS accesses undefined results[] -> crash

issues.title: Coverage shape lacks TS type guarantee
issues.failure_scenario: Backend changes coverage key names -> frontend crashes on undefined access

issues.title: Circular import works only due to deferred import
issues.failure_scenario: Moving import to top-level would cause ImportError on partially-initialized module

issues.title: No .env.example for 29+ env vars
issues.failure_scenario: New developer has no reference -> misconfigures env -> silent failures

issues.title: Model names hardcoded in source (no central registry)
issues.failure_scenario: Model deprecated -> must find/replace across 3 files -> one missed -> wrong model used

issues.title: Inline retry vs shared http_retry inconsistency
issues.failure_scenario: Core http_retry updated with new status codes -> inline copies miss the update -> different behavior

issues.title: Test-case link classification logic duplicated
issues.failure_scenario: New link type added to ADO classifier -> forgotten in JIRA -> JIRA tests miscounted

issues.title: _safe_name() filename sanitizer duplicated 3x
issues.failure_scenario: Unicode edge case fixed in one copy -> other two still vulnerable

issues.title: Missing agentic modules from module table
issues.failure_scenario: Panel sees no mention of agentic_runner.py -> questions if new arch exists

issues.title: Lists version bump to 3.40.0 as pending
issues.failure_scenario: Developer thinks 3.40.0 bump still needed -> confusion about current state

issues.title: Phase 3a references non-existent qa_agent.py
issues.failure_scenario: Developer looks for qa_agent.py -> file missing -> blocks their work

issues.title: Claims 35 tools without verification
issues.failure_scenario: Actual tool count differs -> spec unreliable for capacity planning

issues.title: Commit hash stale (7acde8d vs actual HEAD)
issues.failure_scenario: Reference commit doesn't match code -> confusing for auditors

issues.title: Module never imported from production code
issues.failure_scenario: Dead code increases maintenance burden and confuses readers

issues.title: Module only imported by tests
issues.failure_scenario: Appears functional but is unreachable from any entry point

issues.title: Module only imported by tests
issues.failure_scenario: Maintenance burden for dead functionality

issues.title: Module only imported by tests
issues.failure_scenario: Dead code confused with active feature

issues.title: Empty file with no code
issues.failure_scenario: Placeholder that was never implemented

issues.title: Never imported by any production module
issues.failure_scenario: Unreachable code maintained unnecessarily

issues.title: Only test imports this module
issues.failure_scenario: Appears active but unreachable from entry points

issues.title: Unreachable via graph (only called through deferred import)
issues.failure_scenario: Graph analysis marks as dead but actually reachable at runtime via deferred import in uploader.py

issues.title: Only reachable through lazy runtime dispatch
issues.failure_scenario: Static analysis cannot confirm reachability

issues.title: 3 exported functions never called
issues.failure_scenario: Dead exports bloat bundle and confuse API surface

issues.title: Healing attempt uses hardcoded selector list
issues.failure_scenario: Self-healing never adapts -> always tries same 3 selectors -> useless on new UI

issues.title: History write race on concurrent tests
issues.failure_scenario: Two tests finish simultaneously -> both write history.json -> one write lost

issues.title: Tab assertion race after navigation
issues.failure_scenario: Tab count checked before new tab fully created -> false assertion failure

issues.title: No debounce on message send
issues.failure_scenario: Fast typing + Enter -> duplicate messages sent

issues.title: Selection state not cleared on board switch
issues.failure_scenario: Switch boards -> old selection applied to new board -> wrong items modified

issues.title: 30s timeout ignores cfg.http_timeout_sec
issues.failure_scenario: User sets longer timeout in config -> this path still times out at 30s -> inconsistent

issues.title: SaveSettingsRequest accepts undeclared AI fields
issues.failure_scenario: TS type would reject at compile if strict -> currently duck-typed

issues.title: parent_id int vs JIRA string keys
issues.failure_scenario: JIRA issue key PROJ-123 -> int() cast -> ValueError crash

issues.title: /kb/index returns undocumented reused field
issues.failure_scenario: Extra field harmless but undocumented -> confusing for API consumers

issues.title: tc_id empty string for generated cases
issues.failure_scenario: Frontend displays empty string as test ID -> confusing UI

issues.title: /version endpoint exists but no TS client method
issues.failure_scenario: Dead endpoint or missed integration opportunity

issues.title: 20+ hardcoded timeout values
issues.failure_scenario: Changing timeout requires editing 20 locations

issues.title: html_to_text in ado-specific module despite general use
issues.failure_scenario: Other modules reimplement HTML stripping instead of sharing

issues.title: Path construction scattered across 207 occurrences
issues.failure_scenario: Path convention change requires touching 67 files

issues.title: Identical Modal + onClose + busy boilerplate
issues.failure_scenario: Dialog pattern change requires updating 12 components

issues.title: Update check interval doc says 10min -- unverified
issues.failure_scenario: Doc may not match actual code constant

issues.title: No version reference in run log
issues.failure_scenario: Cannot correlate test runs to specific code version

issues.title: References v3.40.0 AboutDialog rewrite
issues.failure_scenario: Stale progress tracker confuses current state

issues.title: No mention of agentic_runner in deploy checklist
issues.failure_scenario: Deploy checklist misses verifying key new component

issues.title: Generated date 2026-07-21 but content is v3.44.0 era
issues.failure_scenario: Misleading freshness signal -> reader trusts stale content

issues.title: Module unreachable from entry points
issues.failure_scenario: ADF formatter maintained but never called

issues.title: Utility file unreachable in import graph
issues.failure_scenario: Dead utility code in bundle

issues.title: Standalone script unreachable from server
issues.failure_scenario: Maintained but only usable via direct CLI invocation

issues.title: VBScript shortcut ignores Unicode paths
issues.failure_scenario: User with non-ASCII username -> shortcut fails silently

issues.title: Pythonw.exe detection falls back silently
issues.failure_scenario: Python installed without pythonw -> background mode unavailable -> no user notification

issues.title: No locator caching (LLM hit every action)
issues.failure_scenario: $0.46/TC cost adds up at 100+ TCs -> no cache reuse between identical navigations

issues.title: No deterministic replay mode for CI
issues.failure_scenario: Every CI run is non-deterministic -> flaky results -> unreliable gate

issues.title: Multiple typos in documentation
issues.failure_scenario: Panel notices spelling errors -> negative impression

issues.title: Inconsistent log level prefixes
issues.failure_scenario: Some logs use [info] vs [INFO] -> inconsistent output

issues.title: Mixed f-string and .format() usage
issues.failure_scenario: Inconsistent style makes code harder to read

issues.title: Unused imports left in file
issues.failure_scenario: Lint warning noise -> developer ignores real warnings

issues.title: Inconsistent error message casing
issues.failure_scenario: Some errors uppercase, some lowercase -> inconsistent UX

issues.title: Commented-out debug code left in place
issues.failure_scenario: Dead comments clutter code -> confusing for reviewers

issues.title: TODO comments without tracking IDs
issues.failure_scenario: Untracked TODOs never resolved -> technical debt accumulates

issues.title: Magic numbers without named constants
issues.failure_scenario: Timeout values (30000, 60000) without explanation -> hard to tune

issues.title: Hardcoded embedding dimension without comment
issues.failure_scenario: Model change requires finding magic 1536 constant

issues.title: Overly long function (200+ lines)
issues.failure_scenario: Hard to test and maintain -> cognitive overload
